name: @holmhq/sdk
description: The universal TypeScript SDK for Holm apps and surfaces.

scripts.build: node -e "fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node scripts/write-dist-manifest.mjs
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck:core && npm run test:types && npm run test:source && npm run check:repro && npm run test:declarations && npm run test:dist && npm run test:coverage && npm run check:licenses && npm run size
scripts.test:types: tsc -p tsconfig.test-types.core.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.test-types.web.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.test-types.node.json --noEmit
